title: Panchang Output Consolidation and Typography Wrap Record
corrections: Panchang preview no longer opens a duplicate large result panel.
Preview Panchang updates the existing Panchang table area.
Upcoming Observance text is linked to selected location basis while remaining under editorial verification.
Native stale dropdowns are visually hidden and pilot buttons remain the active selectors.
Long values are wrapped and humanized to prevent text overflow.
